subject: New Opening: Software Engineer – Python
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the telecom/media sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a senior Software Engineer with strong experience in Python. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:

  • Python
  • GCP
  • Kafka

Details:
Client: NordCast
Start: ASAP
Duration: 6 months
Location: Stockholm (remote)
Rate: up to 950 SEK/h

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
Therese Magnusson
Staffing Coordinator
Staffbridge Nordic
Tel: +46 76 344 56 78
